events.description: Looking back to histories of abstraction that predate modern art, artist Kamrooz Aram (@kamroozegar)’s work references art forms that have often been characterized by Western art historians as merely decorative. The Morgan Garden reopens this Friday, May 1, and will be open with museum admission during public hours every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday through November 1, 2026.

Tucked in front of the historic library, the Garden offers one of New York’s most elegant greenspaces, where periwinkle beds line the loggia, bluestone pathways echo Renaissance floor
